hero.title: We build games and interactive apps — from concept to launch on Google Play, App Store, and Steam.
hero.subtitle: Games, business apps, and prototypes. Remote worldwide.
hero.micro: We won't promise an MMORPG in a week. A solid prototype — yes.

services.title: Services
services.lead: We tailor scope to your task and budget. Pricing is discussed after the brief.
services.quickText: Best when you need to validate an idea quickly, show a demo, or collect first feedback.
services.micro: We work in stages so your budget does not face a hardcore level without save points.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.videoText: A short trailer with selected studio projects.
portfolio.playlistText: Watch more demos, prototypes, and project clips on YouTube.

process.title: How we work
process.note: Pricing is discussed individually after the brief.

about.title: About studio
about.text: Somnium Project is a project-based team for games and interactive apps. We shape the team around the task: from a fast prototype to a launch on Google Play, App Store, and Steam. Remote worldwide.
about.sdkText: We integrate production SDKs: backend, auth, analytics, push notifications, monetization, crash reporting, multiplayer, and live-ops.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.lead: Describe your task and leave any convenient contact. We reply within 24–48 hours.
contacts.taskPlaceholder: What should we build and what result do you need?
contacts.fileLabel: File (PDF / DOC / DOCX, up to 10 MB)
contacts.success: We will contact you within 24–48 hours.
contacts.error: Failed to send the form. Check your Formspree endpoint.
contacts.fileError: Upload PDF, DOC, or DOCX only, up to 10 MB.
